bird.name: 縱紋腹小鴞
bird.summary: 縱紋腹小鴞（学名：Athene noctua）是鸱鸮科小鸮属的一种。 分布 本种分布于欧洲、非洲东北部、亚洲西部和中部、俄罗斯、伊朗、伊拉克、阿富汗、巴基斯坦、印度北部、锡金、不丹、蒙古和朝鲜及中国北方。

locations.name: 朝鮮 (地區)
locations.summary: 朝鮮，又稱韓、高丽等，是东亚的一个地区，位于欧亚大陆东端，包含朝鲜半岛（韓半岛）、济州岛及朝鲜半岛附近的几个岛屿。東北接壤俄罗斯，北面接壤中國，通過朝鲜海峡和日本海與日本隔海相望。其位处汉字文化圈内，传统上深受汉文化影响，但也在建筑、音乐…

locations.name: Strumpshaw Fen RSPB reserve
locations.summary: Strumpshaw Fen is a nature reserve managed by the Royal Society for the Protection of Birds (RSPB).

relations.evidence: 01.jpg | image_caption = | image2 = Athene noctua - Little Owl XC309481.mp3 | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | genus = Athene | species = noctua | authority = (Scopoli, 1769) | synonyms = Carine noctua | range_map = AtheneNoctuaIUCN.svg | range_map_caption = Range of the little owl }} thumb|3D scan of little owl skeleton The little owl (Athene noctua), also known as the owl of Athena or owl of Minerva, is a bird that inhabits much of the temperate and warmer parts of Europe, the Palearctic east to Korea, and North Africa
